overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from a waterfront pier through neon-lit streets lined with holographic billboards, passing parked vehicles and brutalist architecture before continuing along an elevated walkway.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked pier toward the distant city lights

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the pier
dark water visible beyond the pier edge
faint glow of building lights across the water
wet concrete decking of the pier

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-lashed waterfront pier at night. The camera moves forward along wet concrete decking flanked by metal railings, with dark water visible to the sides and the distant glow of city lights ahead. Heavy rain falls continuously, creating a hazy atmosphere with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with parked vehicles and towering billboards

events.description: exits waterfront pier onto asphalt city street with parked vehicles
camera tilts upward to view tall brutalist building facades and FERVO billboard

agents.ego_description: turning onto the street and looking up at the towering architecture and neon signage

entered.detail: futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb
tall street light with orange glow
large illuminated sign with FERVO text on building facade
tall dark concrete building with geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the pier to an urban street corner. The camera moves past parked futuristic vehicles along wet asphalt, then tilts upward to reveal towering brutalist architecture and a prominent FERVO billboard high on a building facade. The environment remains exposed to heavy rain with neon lighting reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit street with large holographic advertisements and construction barriers

events.description: passing large illuminated billboards with pink and yellow neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet street past glowing billboards and safety barriers

notable_agents.action: distant figures in orange clothing standing near the billboard area

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard with pink neon text FEEL THE CHEMISTRY
short orange and black safety barriers along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the rain-slicked street past massive glowing billboards, including a prominent pink neon advertisement for FEEL THE CHEMISTRY. Orange construction barriers and metal barricades line the left side of the path, while parked cars sit along the right. Sparse figures in orange clothing are visible in the distance near the bright signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with orange safety railings

events.description: moving from street level to elevated walkway with continuous orange safety railings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rain-slicked walkway beside modern glass buildings

entered.detail: continuous orange metal safety railings along the walkway edge
tall building with illuminated windows and glass facade
dark entrance to building at walkway end

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an elevated pedestrian walkway defined by continuous orange safety railings on the left. The camera moves along wet concrete past modern glass buildings with illuminated windows, heading toward a dark building entrance in the distance. The heavy rain continues, reflecting off the walkway surface and railings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a desolate, rain-lashed waterfront into the neon-saturated heart of a futuristic urban center. It begins on a wet concrete pier flanked by metal railings, moving through a heavy downpour toward the distant glow of the city. As the camera transitions from the pier to an urban street corner, it passes parked futuristic vehicles and tilts upward to reveal towering brutalist architecture and a glowing FERVO billboard. The scene then proceeds along rain-slicked asphalt past massive pink neon advertisements and orange construction barriers before shifting onto an elevated pedestrian walkway. Finally, the camera moves past modern glass buildings with illuminated windows, following a line of orange safety railings toward a dark building entrance under the persistent rain.
